visual_analysis.structural_description: The frame is divided into four zones: top left, top right, bottom left, and bottom right. Each zone contains a different STEM element, including equations, physical drawings of baseballs, and hand gestures. The zones are connected by lines and arrows, indicating relationships between the elements.
visual_analysis.layout: The frame is arranged in a 2x2 grid, with each zone occupying a quadrant.
visual_analysis.text_readout: ΣF/m = a, ΣF = m a, ΣF = m ΔV/Δt, ΣF = Δ(mV)/Δt, Momentum, ΣF = ΔP/Δt, How quickly momentum is changing, P = mV (kg·m/s), m(Vf - Vi), Δ(mVf - mVi), Δ(mVf - mVi)/Δt, Hand, Hand, Hand, Hand, Baseball, Baseball, Baseball, Baseball, Vector, Vector, Vector, Vector, Label, Label, Label, Label
visual_analysis.spatial_map: The top left zone contains equations, the top right zone contains equations and a label, the bottom left zone contains a physical drawing and equations, and the bottom right zone contains a physical drawing and equations.
visual_analysis.colors_styles: The frame uses black text on a black background, with white arrows and vectors. The physical drawings are in white, and the labels are in black.
